query:
SELECT 
  cq.id,
  cq.phoneNumber,
  cq.callerIdStr AS callerId,
  cq.status,
  cq.result,
  cq.errorMessage,
  cq.callDuration,
  cq.createdAt,
  cq.claimedAt,
  cq.completedAt,
  c.name AS campaignName,
  pa.name AS agentName
FROM call_queue cq
LEFT JOIN campaigns c ON cq.campaignId = c.id
LEFT JOIN pbx_agents pa ON cq.agentId = pa.agentId
WHERE cq.completedAt > (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 - 600000)
   OR cq.claimedAt > (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 - 600000)
   OR cq.createdAt > (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() * 1000 - 600000)
ORDER BY cq.id DESC
LIMIT 20;
